use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use caido-cli because security auditing toolkit (CLI).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use caido-cli as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `caido-cli [options] [args]` as documented upstream for caido-cli.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair caido-cli with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `caido-cli --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
